pk_tuples.notes: Cholangiocarcinoma patients at steady state, 125 mg QD (3 wks on/1 wk off). AUC0-24hr=6284 ng*hr/mL (42%CV), n=8 for AUC. Cmax=330 ng/mL (49%CV), n=11. Tmax median 6h (2-7). t1/2 at SS. CL/F=24.2 L/h at SS
Healthy reference arm for mild hepatic impairment study QBGJ398-107, 125 mg single dose, Child-Pugh A comparator. GeoMean Cmax=46.6 ng/mL, AUCt=436, AUCinf=447
